fields.title: Enterprise Video Analytics Platform
fields.short_description: A real-time edge-computing platform processing 10k+ video streams. Implemented a custom queuing system that reduced latency by 45%.
fields.description:
This enterprise-grade video analytics platform was designed to process thousands of concurrent video streams in real-time. The system uses a distributed architecture with edge computing nodes that perform initial processing before sending metadata to central servers.

Key technical achievements:
- Custom message queue implementation optimized for video frame data
- Sub-200ms end-to-end processing latency
- Auto-scaling based on stream count and processing load
- Multi-region deployment for high availability

The platform supports facial recognition, license plate detection, and anomaly detection across all streams simultaneously.
fields.technologies: FastAPI, Kubernetes, AWS, Redis, PostgreSQL, TensorFlow, OpenCV
fields.metrics:
10K+ concurrent streams
45% latency reduction
99.9% uptime
Multi-region deployment

fields.title: MLOps Deployment Engine
fields.short_description: Automated deployment and monitoring for large language models. Built with Kubeflow and custom Prometheus exporters.
fields.description:
An end-to-end MLOps platform that automates the journey from model training to production deployment. The system provides versioning, A/B testing, and automatic rollback capabilities.

Key features:
- Automated model validation and testing pipeline
- Canary deployments with traffic splitting
- Real-time performance monitoring and alerting
- Model versioning and lineage tracking
- Self-service deployment for data science team

The platform reduced model deployment time from weeks to hours while maintaining production stability.
fields.technologies: Kubeflow, Docker, Jenkins, AWS Lambda, FastAPI, MLflow, Prometheus, Grafana
fields.metrics:
Deployment time: weeks → hours
Automated rollback capability
Real-time model monitoring
Self-service for DS team
